nodes.name: Twitter API Search
nodes.notes:
Create a Header Auth credential named 'Twitter Bearer Token'.
Set Name: Authorization
Set Value: Bearer YOUR_TWITTER_BEARER_TOKEN
(Include the word 'Bearer ' with a space before your token.)

nodes.name: Telegram Raid Report
nodes.notes:
Create a Header Auth credential named 'Telegram Bot Token'.
Set Name: Authorization
Set Value: <your_bot_token> (just the token, no Bearer prefix).
